title: salix × hirtii
intro: Salix × hirtii, also known as the hybrid willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that is a cross between two species of willow, Salix fragilis and Salix alba. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Salix × hirtii include reducing fever, relieving headaches and migraines, and even helping to alleviate symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
